title: SplitTab
description: A group expense tracker that makes it easy to split bills, track shared expenses, and settle up with friends. Built for simplicity and real-time collaboration.

title: On The Spectrum
description: A digital version of the Wavelength party game for 4-12 players. One player gives a clue, the team guesses where it falls on a spectrum — earn points based on accuracy with a smooth, animated dial interface.

title: Project Three
description: A beautiful mobile-first application that provides an exceptional user experience across all devices.
